subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qablí-Muhammad! Thy letter hath attained unto the Most Holy Court, and the servant in attendance hath presented it in its entirety before the Presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل محمد مکتوبت بساحت اقدس فائز و عبد حاضر تمام آنرا در حضور عرض نمود
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for spiritual recognition, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
